title: VaultResultMediationE18
description: Capability-track constant-shape output for MEDIATION purpose (E18 variant). Max entropy: 18.49 bits (368,640 outputs).

a_move.description: Recommended move for party A (8 values = 3.00 bits)

b_move.description: Recommended move for party B (8 values = 3.00 bits)

conflict_type.description: Classification of conflict type (5 values = ~2.32 bits)

emotional_tone_a.description: Observable emotional tone of party A's input (8 values = 3.00 bits)

emotional_tone_b.description: Observable emotional tone of party B's input (8 values = 3.00 bits)

x-vcav-prompt-instruction: Based on this mediation conversation, assess the situation, recommend next moves, and classify the observable emotional tone from each party's input text.
x-vcav-prompt-output-format:
Respond with valid JSON using ONLY these values:
- outcome: "PROGRESS" | "STUCK" | "ESCALATE"
- a_move: "ACKNOWLEDGE" | "RESTATE_NEEDS" | "OFFER_REPAIR" | "REQUEST_CLARITY" | "REQUEST_ACKNOWLEDGMENT" | "SET_BOUNDARY" | "PROPOSE_COMPROMISE" | "NONE"
- b_move: (same options as a_move)
- shared_move: "ENUMERATE_CONTRIBUTIONS" | "SET_GROUND_RULES" | "TIMEBOX" | "PAUSE" | "SEEK_EXTERNAL_INPUT" | "NONE"
- conflict_type: "RECOGNITION" | "RESOURCE" | "PROCESS" | "VALUES" | "UNKNOWN"
- emotional_tone_a: "CALM" | "CONCERNED" | "FRUSTRATED" | "ANXIOUS" | "HOSTILE" | "DISMISSIVE" | "HOPEFUL" | "RESIGNED"
- emotional_tone_b: "CALM" | "CONCERNED" | "FRUSTRATED" | "ANXIOUS" | "HOSTILE" | "DISMISSIVE" | "HOPEFUL" | "RESIGNED"
$comment: Total entropy: ~18.49 bits (3×8×8×6×5×8×8 = 368,640 outputs). E18 extends E12 anchor with two fact-grounded emotional tone fields.
